'''Kidiet Olgo''' was a celestial body and a [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]]<ref name="Gamer7">{{GamerCite|7|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Anx}}</ref> located in the [[Kidiet Olgo system/Legends|Kidiet Olgo system]], a part of the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. A [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connected it to the [[Mamendin system/Legends|Mamendin system]]<ref name="TEA" /> of the [[Farrfin sector/Legends|Farrfin sector]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[Graxol Kelvyyn/Legends|Graxol Kelvyyn]], an [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Slaver/Legends|enslaver]] operating throughout the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="Gamer7" /> around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="32 BBY">{{GamerCite|7|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Anx}} establishes that [[Graxol Kelvyyn/Legends|Graxol Kelvyyn]] operated as an [[Slaver/Legends|enslaver]] at the same [[Time/Legends|time]] he attended [[Podracing/Legends|Podraces]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. {{Film|I}} depicts Kelvyyn attending the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] Podrace, and ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the film's events to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> associated himself with a network of enslaved beings' [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], some of which made their living at Kidiet Olgo.<ref name="Gamer7" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kidiet Olgo was first mentioned in "[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Anx]]," a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] source article published in the [[Star Wars Gamer 7|seventh issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine<ref name="Gamer7" /> on [[October 16]], [[2001]]<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20011018.html|text=Live on the Fringe: ''Gamer'' # 7}}</ref> for use with [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Gamer7" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Kidiet Olgo [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square L-9.<ref name="TEA" />
